subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from His Most Great Prison, and counseleth thee with that which shall set the trees ablaze and cause them to flow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر یذکرک المظلوم فی منظره الاکبر و یوصیک بما تشتعل به الاشجار و تجری به
subcodes.subjects: @love as fire, @praise and encouragement, @the power of words; of speech, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
